org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.zoom

Interface DocumentWrapper

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractDocumentWrapper

    public interface DocumentWrapper
    This interface represents a piece of document that could be graphically rendered.
    Version:
    $FullVersion$
    Author:
    $Author: galland$
    Maven Group Id:
    $GroupId$
    Maven Artifact Id:
    $ArtifactId$

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addChangeListener(ChangeListener listener)
      Add a listener on the changes in this document.
      Rectangle2f getDocumentBounds()
      Replies the bounds of the document.
      void removeChangeListener(ChangeListener listener)
      Remove a listener on the changes in this document.

    • Method Detail

      • getDocumentBounds

        Rectangle2f getDocumentBounds()
        Replies the bounds of the document.
        Returns:
        the bounds in the logical coordinate space (not necessary the screen space); or null if the bounds are not known.

      • addChangeListener

        void addChangeListener(ChangeListener listener)
        Add a listener on the changes in this document.
        Parameters:
        listener -

      • removeChangeListener

        void removeChangeListener(ChangeListener listener)
        Remove a listener on the changes in this document.
        Parameters:
        listener -
